# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVpc

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetA

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVpcIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

  VPCFlowLogs:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref MyVpc
      TrafficType: ALL
      LogGroupName: MyVpcFlowLogs
